page: Google Cloud Platform ct3-hightpu-4t is a specialized accelerator-optimized server configured with 96 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture. The system features 340.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.54 GB of RAM per core, distributed across 2 vNUMA nodes. This server integrates four dedicated ct3 hardware accelerators, designed for parallelized compute tasks.

This instance type does not include local NVMe storage, requiring external block storage solutions for persistent data. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation where the cost is primarily driven by the integration of the four specialized accelerators and the large dedicated vCPU count, making it a specialized investment rather than a general-purpose utility instance.

The ct3-hightpu-4t is engineered for workloads that require heavy parallel processing capabilities. Suitable workloads include machine learning training and inference, large-scale data science jobs, mathematical simulations, and other high-performance computing tasks that can leverage the four integrated ct3 accelerators alongside the 96 dedicated vCPUs.
description: Google Cloud Platform ct3-hightpu-4t is a specialized accelerator-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 340.0 GB of system memory distributed across 2 vNUMA nodes. The hardware configuration is distinguished by the integration of four ct3 accelerators, providing substantial parallel processing power for compute-intensive operations. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all data persistence relies on network-attached storage. With approximately 3.54 GB of RAM per core and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, the resource profile is tailored for high-density compute tasks. The ct3-hightpu-4t is designed for workloads such as machine learning training, large-scale data science computations, and parallelized simulation tasks that directly benefit from dedicated accelerator hardware.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform ct3-hightpu-4t is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 340 GB of RAM, and four integrated ct3 accelerators for parallelized machine learning and compute workloads.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized server featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and four integrated hardware accelerators for highly parallelized compute and machine learning workloads.
